January 22, 2026

Elected Officials Need to Do Far More to Stand Up to ICE and Trump, Say Minnesotans

 Meghnad Bose
The killing of Renee Nicole Good by ICE officer Jonathan Ross on January 7th during Operation Metro Surge, ICE’s extended crackdown on Minnesota’s Twin Cities, has unleashed a wave of protests across the country. Despite the vocal public opposition, the raids themselves are intensifying. More than 3,000 federal agents have...
